title: Pet Munchies Chicken Strips Dog Treats, Premium Dog Chews with Natural Real Meat, Low in Fat and High in Protein 90g (Pack of 8)
features: 100% NATURAL, PREMIUM REAL CHICKEN: This gourmet treat is made with 100% natural, human-grade, chicken breast meat - delicately roasted to perfection in their own natural juices

HEALTHY & JUNK-FREE: Our healthy chicken strips contain no artificial colours or flavours, are naturally high in protein, wheat and gluten free and low in fat & salt making them the perfect treat to feed your four legged friends
PERFECT FOR TRAINING: These tender strips of chicken can be given as a chew, and are easy to break up for delicious training and reward treats for walks and recall

SUITABLE FOR ALL BREEDS & SIZES: Our chicken strips are suitable for all breeds of dogs and puppies over 4 months - please remember that these treats should make up a small part of your pet's balanced diet

SEALED WITH A DOG'S APPROVAL: Pet Munchies is a UK based company dedicated to creating premium, gourmet treats that are made with high quality, human grade meat. Our treats are delicious, nutritious and wholesome, with all the meaty flavours dogs love delicately toasted to perfection!
description: Product Description Superb quality pet treats made of real meat. The taste is naturally enhanced by slow roasting in their own natural juices. Dog treats are both healthier and tastier if they are made from pure, natural ingredients without additives or added sugar. So that is exactly how these treats are made. Available in five varieties - chicken breast fillets, chicken strips, chicken chips, duck breast fillets and beef liver. Indications all life stages, training, reward, high protein Ingredients Chicken Breast, Glycerin, Starch, Salt Directions Feeding guide: See table on pack. Supervise your pet whilst feeding them a treat and ensure fresh drinking water is available. Box Contains Each order comes with 8 x Pet Munchies 90g Pouches See more
